scope.summary: Reconciles WS-E cross-repo e2e suite E1-E6: every child lane is closed with its own committed evidence, and no WS-E child scope remains open.
out_of_scope: This epic close asserts child closure only. It does not itself re-run E1-E6, and it makes no readiness claim about the product beyond what each child's own evidence establishes.
Live OCI ADB validation is NOT covered here; it remains open under oraclemcp-091-f4-real-adb-b6-jm290.

entry_points.name: WS-E child closure status
entry_points.trace: br dep list oraclemcp-091-ws-e-e2e-dcrif reports 7 edges: 1 parent-child to the 0.10.0/0.9.0 train root, and 6 blocks-edges E1..E6 all [closed].

entry_points.name: E1 closure witness
entry_points.trace: oraclemcp-091-e1-ladder-e2e-jel20 (operating-level ladder e2e: elevation, TTL, protected, scope-lowering) closed at closing=201a6477829a source=ddcdbc7c45ac

entry_points.name: E2 closure witness
entry_points.trace: oraclemcp-091-e2-sec1-reclassify-64fpf (SEC-1: every recovery path re-classifies at apply) closed at closing=9dffe9f384e7 source=7d4314bf159c

entry_points.name: E3 closure witness
entry_points.trace: oraclemcp-091-e3-audit-chain-e2e-69bbf (audit hash-chain e2e: record everything, detect truncation) closed at closing=d0263cb279a7 source=e0f319d08367

entry_points.name: E4 closure witness
entry_points.trace: oraclemcp-091-e4-dashboard-e2e-sobjr (dashboard e2e implemented by R3's browser lane, wired not duplicated) closed at closing=b5b6ebf216cb source=79bba6c67b30

entry_points.name: E5 closure witness
entry_points.trace: oraclemcp-091-e5-failure-recovery-e2e-bf1qa (kills, refusals, expiry, revocation) closed at closing=c3d37077e988 source=63ae7f5f6550; its live artifact records run_id=20260722T205332Z lane=local-rig/failure_recovery_e2e

entry_points.name: E6 closure witness
entry_points.trace: oraclemcp-091-e6-e2e-attestations-ocqon (signed attestations for e2e runs) closed at closing=f1a4371595d8 source=ef3e6c8cfc21

limitations: An epic reconciliation inherits its strength from the children. E5's wire proof is a LOCAL lane (local-rig/failure_recovery_e2e), not a hosted scheduled lane, and its evidence records that distinction explicitly rather than borrowing CI provenance.
follow_ups: oraclemcp-091-f4-real-adb-b6-jm290 still carries the real-ADB validation this suite cannot reach without an Always-Free OCI ADB.
